focus.note: Figma shows 1px border, NOT 2px. shadow-focus effect has spread=0 (invisible).

danger.note: No outer ring. Spread=0 in Figma.

warning.note: No outer ring. Spread=0 in Figma.

success.note: No outer ring. Spread=0 in Figma.
